isolation.boundary: localhost-only URLs, no product code modification

steps.action: Open /traceability/ and verify matrix is rendered
steps.observed: Linkage Matrix rendered with 11 category rows and coverage summary

steps.action: Expand a category and select a spec
steps.expected: Spec selection reveals linked file details
steps.observed: Behaviours > Auth opens detail table with linked artifact

steps.action: Inspect file link href
steps.observed: href is https://github.com/sdawka/bropilot/blob/main/lib/bropilot/api/auth.ex

evidence.network: GET /api/traceability via page load (UI populated); href inspection confirmed navigable GitHub URL

assertions.title: Traceability page handles empty state

steps.action: Open /traceability/ and check initial state
steps.observed: Preloaded runtime already contains traceability data (33 total specs, 26 linked)

steps.action: Attempt non-disruptive setup for empty-state check
steps.expected: Safe path to isolate a fresh empty traceability dataset
steps.observed: No project-scoped safe reset path in assigned shared localhost runtime without impacting other validators

evidence.network: GET /api/traceability shows existing entries and non-empty coverage

assertions.issues: Blocked by unavailable precondition: fresh empty traceability state in shared runtime.

assertions.title: Traceability matrix loads with large spec set

steps.action: Inspect current matrix scale
steps.observed: Current dataset is 33 total specs / 26 linked; does not meet large-dataset precondition

steps.action: Attempt to increase dataset via build
steps.expected: Build populates significantly larger link set
steps.observed: POST /api/build returned 200 with files_written: [] and no coverage growth

evidence.network: POST /api/build -> 200 with files_written=[]; coverage remained unchanged

assertions.issues: Blocked by missing 50+ entity / 100+ file precondition in assigned environment.

assertions.title: All sidebar pages load without error

steps.action: Navigate each sidebar route
steps.observed: Visited /, /problem/, /solution/, /work/, /knowledge/, /vibe/, /build/, /connect/, /domain/, /traceability/ successfully

steps.action: Check console errors per page
steps.observed: agent-browser errors returned none for every page

steps.action: Verify HTTP status codes
steps.observed: curl checks returned 200 for all listed routes

evidence.consoleErrors: none across all listed sidebar pages
evidence.network: curl status checks: all listed routes returned HTTP 200

assertions.title: Traceability page after partial codegen

steps.action: Record baseline traceability coverage
steps.observed: Baseline API coverage: total_specs=33, total_linked=26, total_unlinked=7

steps.action: Attempt partial-codegen interruption
steps.expected: Mid-run interruption leaves partial link set
steps.observed: POST /api/build completed immediately (version 26) with files_written=[]; no partial state surfaced

steps.action: Re-check traceability after attempt
steps.observed: Coverage and entry counts unchanged (33/26/7, entries=26)

assertions.issues: Blocked by unavailable precondition: could not induce a partial-codegen state in shared runtime.

steps.action: Open category spec list in traceability matrix
steps.observed: Spec entries render status-dot status-linked markers with title like 'Linked (1 links)'

assertions.title: Unlinked specs display warning indicator

steps.action: Inspect category with unlinked count > 0 (e.g., Constraints 1 linked / 2 unlinked)
steps.expected: Unlinked specs shown with warning indicator
steps.observed: Expanded spec list displayed only linked entry; DOM check found status-unlinked count = 0 in list

evidence.network: Matrix row shows unlinked counts, but no per-spec warning indicator rendered

assertions.issues: Unlinked spec warning styling/indicator not observable in expanded spec list despite non-zero unlinked counts.

assertions.title: Linked file paths are clickable GitHub URLs for GitHub repos

steps.action: Open Behaviours/Auth detail panel
steps.expected: file_path rendered as clickable GitHub link
steps.observed: File path rendered as link with href https://github.com/sdawka/bropilot/blob/main/lib/bropilot/api/auth.ex

evidence.network: href inspected via UI element attribute; matches GitHub blob URL pattern

assertions.title: GitHub URL includes line range when present

steps.action: Open Api/ValTrace002RoundTrip detail (contains line_range [10,25] in API data)
steps.observed: File rendered as broken plain text with ⚠️ not found; no clickable href rendered, so no #L10-L25 suffix

evidence.network: GET /api/traceability includes line_range for lib/val_trace_002_impl.ex, but UI does not render line-range GitHub link

assertions.issues: Line-range deep-link behavior is not observable for line_range entry because rendered output is non-link broken-path text.

assertions.title: Matrix updates after codegen without page reload

steps.action: Capture matrix/coverage before build
steps.observed: Coverage was 33 total / 26 linked / 7 unlinked

steps.action: Trigger build and use in-page refresh
steps.expected: Newly generated links appear in same page session
steps.observed: POST /api/build returned 200 but files_written=[]; after pressing refresh, coverage remained 33/26/7

evidence.network: POST /api/build -> 200 (files_written=[]); no traceability delta to validate UI update behavior

assertions.issues: Blocked by missing precondition: build run did not produce new traceability links.

assertions.title: Empty state renders gracefully

steps.action: Open traceability page and check initial state
steps.expected: Empty-state message for zero-link fresh project
steps.observed: Runtime already has populated matrix (33 total specs, 26 linked)

steps.action: Attempt safe setup within shared runtime constraints
steps.expected: Non-disruptive way to reach empty project state
steps.observed: No safe project-isolated reset path available in assigned shared localhost run

assertions.issues: Blocked by unavailable fresh-empty precondition in shared environment.

steps.action: Open spec containing missing file paths (Api/ValTrace002RoundTrip)
steps.expected: UI marks missing files with warning indicator
steps.observed: Rows show ⚠️ not found badges; DOM check found .broken-link and .file-not-found classes

evidence.network: Broken paths surfaced from traceability data and rendered with warning badges

frictions.description: Some spec entries are not exposed as interactive refs in agent-browser snapshots, requiring DOM click via eval for selection.
frictions.resolution: Used eval-based element selection on .spec-list-panel .spec-entry and then re-validated via snapshot/screenshot.

frictions.description: The assigned runtime starts with preloaded traceability data, preventing deterministic empty-state checks.
frictions.resolution: Captured blocker evidence and marked empty-state assertions blocked per isolation guidance.

blockers.description: Fresh empty traceability precondition unavailable in shared localhost runtime and no safe reset path within isolation boundary.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Validated current state via /traceability and /api/traceability; attempted non-disruptive options only.

blockers.description: Large dataset precondition (50+ entities / 100+ files) not present in assigned environment.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Triggered build endpoint; response contained files_written=[] and no coverage increase.

blockers.description: Could not create a partial-codegen state; build endpoint completed immediately and produced no partial link delta.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Ran build requests including a timeout-based interruption attempt; coverage remained unchanged before/after.

summary: Tested 12 assigned assertions: 5 passed, 2 failed, 5 blocked. Passes: VAL-CROSS-022, VAL-CROSS-060, VAL-TUI-003, VAL-TUI-006, VAL-TUI-012. Fails: VAL-TUI-004, VAL-TUI-007. Blocked by preconditions/runtime constraints: VAL-CROSS-025, VAL-CROSS-026, VAL-CROSS-082, VAL-TUI-010, VAL-TUI-011.
